message:
fix(bus): relay grandchild events through subprocess spawner chain

Subprocess agents created their own AgentSpawner but never registered
an onEvent callback. Events from depth 2+ agents were published to the
bus but silently dropped because the intermediate spawner had no relay.

This made third-level delegations (e.g. tech-lead → engineer → editor)
invisible in the web UI sidebar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
